challenges.formInTargetLanguage: Waagii hore Soomaaliya ganacsi bay lahayd.
challenges.meaningInSourceLanguage: In earlier times, Somalia had trade.

formInTargetLanguage: Waagii hore Soomaaliya ganacsi bay lahayd.

challenges.formInTargetLanguage: Ganacsato waxay ka iman jireen Masar iyo Carabta.
challenges.meaningInSourceLanguage: Traders used to come from Egypt and Arabia.

phrase.word: used to come from Egypt and Arabia.
phrase.definition: waxay ka iman jireen Masar iyo Carabta

challenges.formattedSolution: Ganacsato waxay ka iman jireen Masar iyo Carabta.

challenges.formInTargetLanguage: Dadka Soomaaliyeed badda way mari jireen.

challenges.formattedSolution: Dadka Soomaaliyeed badda way mari jireen.

challenges.instruction: Translate this as best you can in Somali.
promptLines: In earlier times, Somalia had trade. Islam arrived early.
gradingNotes: Reward recall of the short history story from this lesson.
Accept simple beginner Somali if the main meaning is correct.
Be lenient with punctuation and spacing variation.
challenges.sampleAnswer: Waagii hore Soomaaliya ganacsi bay lahayd. Islaamku goor hore ayuu yimid.

challenges.instruction: Write a short Somali history summary.
promptLines: Write 2 short Somali sentences about early trade or early Islam in Somalia.
challenges.placeholder: Keep the sentences short and simple.
gradingNotes: Reward use of the lesson story and key facts rather than perfect grammar.
Keep corrections targeted to short phrases the learner can reuse.
challenges.sampleAnswer: Ganacsato waxay ka iman jireen Masar iyo Carabta. Islaamku goor hore ayuu yimid.
